title: alyssum diffusum subsp. calabricum
intro: Alyssum diffusum subsp. calabricum, also known as Calabrian alyssum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, native to Italy and characterized by its delicate white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Alyssum diffusum subsp. calabricum offers several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system.
